member.name: T:SmppSharp.Builders.SubmitRequestBuilder
member.summary: Fluent builder for .

member.name: M:SmppSharp.Builders.SubmitRequestBuilder.Text(System.String)
member.summary: Set a text message. Auto-detects GSM7 vs UCS2.

member.name: M:SmppSharp.Builders.SubmitRequestBuilder.Binary(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Set a raw binary payload (data_coding=0x04).

member.name: M:SmppSharp.Builders.SubmitRequestBuilder.Flash
member.summary: Send as Flash SMS (Class 0) — displayed immediately, not stored.

member.name: M:SmppSharp.Builders.SubmitRequestBuilder.WithDeliveryReport(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Request a delivery report. Default: enabled.

member.name: M:SmppSharp.Builders.SubmitRequestBuilder.ForceUcs2
member.summary: Force UCS2 encoding even for ASCII-only text.

member.name: M:SmppSharp.Builders.SubmitRequestBuilder.ValidFor(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Set message validity period.

member.name: M:SmppSharp.Builders.SubmitRequestBuilder.WithCorrelationId(System.String)
member.summary: Attach a correlation ID for tracking (not sent to SMSC).

member.name: M:SmppSharp.Builders.SubmitRequestBuilder.WithEsmClass(System.Byte)
member.summary: Advanced: override the esm_class byte.

member.name: T:SmppSharp.Builders.WapPushBuilder
member.summary: Builds WAP Push Service Indication (SI) messages. Generates the correct binary payload (UDH + WSP + WBXML) for sending via SMPP.

member.name: M:SmppSharp.Builders.WapPushBuilder.CreateSi(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,SmppSharp.Builders.WapPushSignal)
member.summary: Creates a WAP Push Service Indication request ready to be submitted via SMPP.

member.name: T:SmppSharp.Builders.WapPushSignal
member.summary: Signal priority for WAP Push Service Indication.

member.name: F:SmppSharp.Builders.WapPushSignal.None
member.summary: No signal — silently delivered.

member.name: F:SmppSharp.Builders.WapPushSignal.Low
member.summary: Low priority signal.

member.name: F:SmppSharp.Builders.WapPushSignal.Medium
member.summary: Medium priority signal (recommended default).

member.name: F:SmppSharp.Builders.WapPushSignal.High
member.summary: High priority — phone may vibrate/ring.

member.name: F:SmppSharp.Builders.WapPushSignal.Delete
member.summary: Delete a previously sent SI with the same href.

member.name: T:SmppSharp.Codec.Gsm7Encoder
member.summary: GSM 7-bit default alphabet encoder/decoder. Handles the full GSM 03.38 charset including the extension table (@, £, $, etc.)

member.name: M:SmppSharp.Codec.Gsm7Encoder.CanEncode(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if all characters in the string fit in GSM7.

member.name: M:SmppSharp.Codec.Gsm7Encoder.Encode(System.String)
member.summary: Encodes string to GSM7 byte array (unpacked — one byte per character, 2 for extension chars). This is what SMPP submit_sm uses (not the packed 7-bit radio format).

member.name: M:SmppSharp.Codec.Gsm7Encoder.Decode(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Decodes unpacked GSM7 bytes back to a string.

member.name: T:SmppSharp.Codec.MessageSplitter
member.summary: Determines encoding and splits messages into SMS segments.

member.name: M:SmppSharp.Codec.MessageSplitter.EncodeBinary(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Encodes a raw binary payload (data_coding = 0x04). Max 140 bytes/SMS.

member.name: M:SmppSharp.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddSmpp(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{SmppSharp.SmppOptions})
member.summary: Registers a single and starts it as a hosted service.

member.name: T:SmppSharp.Extensions.SmppHostedService
member.summary: Connects the SMPP client on app start and disconnects on stop.

member.name: M:SmppSharp.Extensions.SmppHostedService.#ctor(SmppSharp.ISmppClient)
member.summary: Connects the SMPP client on app start and disconnects on stop.

member.name: T:SmppSharp.Internal.DeliveryReceiptParser
member.summary: Parses SMSC delivery receipt text in the standard format: id:XXXX sub:001 dlvrd:001 submit date:YYMMDDHHMM done date:YYMMDDHHMM stat:DELIVRD err:000 text:...

member.name: M:SmppSharp.Internal.DeliveryReceiptParser.IdPattern
member.remarks:
Pattern:
id:(\\S+)
Options:
RegexOptions.IgnoreCase
Explanation:
○ Match a character in the set [Ii].
○ Match a character in the set [Dd].
○ Match ':'.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match any character other than a whitespace character atomically at least once.

member.name: M:SmppSharp.Internal.DeliveryReceiptParser.SubPattern
member.remarks:
Pattern:
sub:(\\d+)
Options:
RegexOptions.IgnoreCase
Explanation:
○ Match a character in the set [Ss].
○ Match a character in the set [Uu].
○ Match a character in the set [Bb].
○ Match ':'.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match a Unicode digit atomically at least once.

member.name: M:SmppSharp.Internal.DeliveryReceiptParser.DlvrdPattern
member.remarks:
Pattern:
dlvrd:(\\d+)
Options:
RegexOptions.IgnoreCase
Explanation:
○ Match a character in the set [Dd].
○ Match a character in the set [Ll].
○ Match a character in the set [Vv].
○ Match a character in the set [Rr].
○ Match a character in the set [Dd].
○ Match ':'.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match a Unicode digit atomically at least once.

member.name: M:SmppSharp.Internal.DeliveryReceiptParser.SubmitDatePattern
member.remarks:
Pattern:
submit date:(\\d{10})
Options:
RegexOptions.IgnoreCase
Explanation:
○ Match a character in the set [Ss].
○ Match a character in the set [Uu].
○ Match a character in the set [Bb].
○ Match a character in the set [Mm].
○ Match a character in the set [Ii].
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match ' '.
○ Match a character in the set [Dd].
○ Match a character in the set [Aa].
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match ':'.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match a Unicode digit exactly 10 times.

member.name: M:SmppSharp.Internal.DeliveryReceiptParser.DoneDatePattern
member.remarks:
Pattern:
done date:(\\d{10})
Options:
RegexOptions.IgnoreCase
Explanation:
○ Match a character in the set [Dd].
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a character in the set [Nn].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match ' '.
○ Match a character in the set [Dd].
○ Match a character in the set [Aa].
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match ':'.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match a Unicode digit exactly 10 times.

member.name: M:SmppSharp.Internal.DeliveryReceiptParser.StatPattern
member.remarks:
Pattern:
stat:(\\w+)
Options:
RegexOptions.IgnoreCase
Explanation:
○ Match a character in the set [Ss].
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match a character in the set [Aa].
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match ':'.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match a word character atomically at least once.

member.name: M:SmppSharp.Internal.DeliveryReceiptParser.ErrPattern
member.remarks:
Pattern:
err:(\\S+)
Options:
RegexOptions.IgnoreCase
Explanation:
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match a character in the set [Rr] exactly 2 times.
○ Match ':'.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match any character other than a whitespace character atomically at least once.

member.name: T:SmppSharp.ISmppClient
member.summary: SMPP 3.4 client. Manages a persistent TCP session with automatic keepalive and reconnect.

member.name: P:SmppSharp.ISmppClient.IsConnected
member.summary: True when the session is bound and ready to send/receive.

member.name: E:SmppSharp.ISmppClient.OnMessageReceived
member.summary: Fired when an incoming MO message is received.

member.name: E:SmppSharp.ISmppClient.OnDeliveryReceived
member.summary: Fired when a delivery receipt arrives from the SMSC.

member.name: E:SmppSharp.ISmppClient.OnDisconnected
member.summary: Fired when the connection is lost (before any reconnect attempt).

member.name: E:SmppSharp.ISmppClient.OnReconnected
member.summary: Fired after a successful reconnect.

member.name: M:SmppSharp.ISmppClient.ConnectAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Connects to the SMSC and performs the bind operation.

member.name: M:SmppSharp.ISmppClient.DisconnectAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends unbind and closes the TCP connection.

member.name: M:SmppSharp.ISmppClient.SubmitAsync(SmppSharp.Models.SubmitRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Submits an SMS. Automatically:
Detects encoding (GSM7 for Latin, UCS2 for Cyrillic/Arabic/CJK/emoji)
Splits into multipart segments if needed
Handles binary and Flash SMS via flags

member.name: M:SmppSharp.ISmppClient.SubmitBulkAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{SmppSharp.Models.SubmitRequest},System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Submits multiple messages with controlled concurrency. Returns when all messages are sent.

member.name: M:SmppSharp.ISmppClient.SubmitPipelineAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IAsyncEnumerable{SmppSharp.Models.SubmitRequest},System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: High-throughput streaming pipeline. Submits requests as they arrive and yields results as they complete. Suitable for bulk campaigns > 1000 msg/sec.

member.name: T:SmppSharp.Models.DeliverMessage
member.summary: Incoming MO (Mobile Originated) message from a subscriber.

member.name: T:SmppSharp.Models.DeliveryReceipt
member.summary: Delivery receipt received from SMSC via deliver_sm.

member.name: P:SmppSharp.Models.DeliveryReceipt.MessageId
member.summary: Original message_id from submit_sm_resp.

member.name: P:SmppSharp.Models.DeliveryReceipt.ErrorCode
member.summary: Error code string from the receipt (e.g. "000", "099").

member.name: T:SmppSharp.Models.SubmitRequest
member.summary: Represents an outgoing SMS to be submitted via SMPP.

member.name: P:SmppSharp.Models.SubmitRequest.SourceAddress
member.summary: Sender ID (alphanumeric max 11 chars, or numeric up to 20). Examples: "PAYOMAK", "+998712345678"

member.name: P:SmppSharp.Models.SubmitRequest.DestinationAddress
member.summary: Destination phone number. International format recommended: +998901234567

member.name: P:SmppSharp.Models.SubmitRequest.Message
member.summary: Message text. Cyrillic/non-Latin detected automatically → UCS2.

member.name: P:SmppSharp.Models.SubmitRequest.RegisteredDelivery
member.summary: Request delivery receipt from SMSC. Default: true.

member.name: P:SmppSharp.Models.SubmitRequest.ForceUcs2
member.summary: Force UCS2 encoding even for ASCII-only messages.

member.name: P:SmppSharp.Models.SubmitRequest.ValidityPeriod
member.summary: Message validity period. null = SMSC default.

member.name: P:SmppSharp.Models.SubmitRequest.Payload
member.summary: Raw binary payload. When set, overrides and sends a binary SMS (data_coding = 0x04). Use for WAP Push, ringtones, OTA configs, etc.

member.name: P:SmppSharp.Models.SubmitRequest.IsFlash
member.summary: Flash SMS (Class 0) — displayed immediately on the handset without being stored.

member.name: P:SmppSharp.Models.SubmitRequest.EsmClass
member.summary: Advanced: override esm_class byte. 0x40 = UDH indicator (set automatically for WAP Push).

member.name: P:SmppSharp.Models.SubmitRequest.CorrelationId
member.summary: Optional arbitrary reference attached to this request (not sent to SMSC).

member.name: T:SmppSharp.Models.SubmitResult
member.summary: Result of a successful submit_sm operation.

member.name: P:SmppSharp.Models.SubmitResult.MessageId
member.summary: Message ID assigned by the SMSC (from submit_sm_resp). For multipart messages — ID of the last segment.

member.name: P:SmppSharp.Models.SubmitResult.SegmentCount
member.summary: Number of SMS segments sent (1 for short messages).

member.name: P:SmppSharp.Models.SubmitResult.DataCoding
member.summary: Encoding used: 0x00 = GSM7, 0x08 = UCS2.

member.name: P:SmppSharp.Models.SubmitResult.CorrelationId
member.summary: Correlation ID passed in the original .

member.name: F:SmppSharp.Protocol.BindMode.Transmitter
member.summary: Send only.

member.name: F:SmppSharp.Protocol.BindMode.Receiver
member.summary: Receive only (MO + delivery receipts).

member.name: F:SmppSharp.Protocol.BindMode.Transceiver
member.summary: Send and receive. Most common mode.

member.name: T:SmppSharp.Protocol.CommandId
member.summary: SMPP 3.4 command IDs.

member.name: T:SmppSharp.Protocol.CommandStatus
member.summary: SMPP 3.4 command status codes.

member.name: T:SmppSharp.Protocol.DataCoding
member.summary: SMPP data_coding values (GSM 03.38).

member.name: F:SmppSharp.Protocol.DataCoding.Gsm7
member.summary: GSM 7-bit default alphabet (160 chars / SMS).

member.name: F:SmppSharp.Protocol.DataCoding.Latin1
member.summary: Latin-1 / ISO-8859-1.

member.name: F:SmppSharp.Protocol.DataCoding.Binary
member.summary: 8-bit binary data.

member.name: F:SmppSharp.Protocol.DataCoding.Ucs2
member.summary: UCS2 / UTF-16 Big Endian (70 chars / SMS). Required for Cyrillic, Arabic, CJK, etc.

member.name: F:SmppSharp.Protocol.DataCoding.Gsm7Flash
member.summary: GSM7 Flash SMS — Class 0 message, displayed immediately without storing.

member.name: F:SmppSharp.Protocol.DataCoding.Ucs2Flash
member.summary: UCS2 Flash SMS — Class 0 message in Unicode.

member.name: T:SmppSharp.Protocol.Pdu
member.summary: Parsed SMPP PDU.

member.name: T:SmppSharp.Protocol.PduReader
member.summary: Sequential binary reader for SMPP PDU bodies.

member.name: M:SmppSharp.Protocol.PduReader.ReadCString
member.summary: Reads a null-terminated ASCII C-string.

member.name: T:SmppSharp.Protocol.PduWriter
member.summary: Helpers for building SMPP PDU byte arrays.

member.name: M:SmppSharp.Protocol.PduWriter.Build(System.UInt32,System.UInt32,System.UInt32,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Builds a complete PDU byte array including the 16-byte header.

member.name: M:SmppSharp.Protocol.PduWriter.WriteCString(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Byte},System.String)
member.summary: Writes a null-terminated ASCII C-string.

member.name: M:SmppSharp.Protocol.PduWriter.WriteTlv(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Byte},System.UInt16,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Writes a TLV (tag, length, value) optional parameter.

member.name: T:SmppSharp.Protocol.TlvTag
member.summary: Well-known SMPP TLV (optional parameter) tags.

member.name: T:SmppSharp.SmppClient
member.summary: SMPP 3.4 client. Thread-safe, auto-reconnecting, supports text/binary/flash/WAP Push. Integrates with System.Diagnostics.Metrics for observability.

member.name: T:SmppSharp.SmppException
member.summary: Exception thrown when an SMPP operation fails.

member.name: P:SmppSharp.SmppException.CommandStatus
member.summary: SMPP command_status code, if available.

member.name: T:SmppSharp.SmppMetrics
member.summary: Diagnostic metrics for SmppSharp using System.Diagnostics.Metrics. Compatible with OpenTelemetry, Prometheus, and any IMeterFactory consumer.

member.name: F:SmppSharp.SmppMetrics.MeterName
member.summary: Meter name. Use this to subscribe with OpenTelemetry: .AddMeter("SmppSharp").

member.name: F:SmppSharp.SmppMetrics.MessagesSent
member.summary: Total SMS segments successfully submitted (each multipart counts per segment).

member.name: F:SmppSharp.SmppMetrics.MessagesFailed
member.summary: Total submit_sm operations that failed.

member.name: F:SmppSharp.SmppMetrics.MessagesReceived
member.summary: Total MO (mobile-originated) messages received.

member.name: F:SmppSharp.SmppMetrics.ReceiptsReceived
member.summary: Total delivery receipts received from the SMSC.

member.name: F:SmppSharp.SmppMetrics.Reconnects
member.summary: Total reconnect attempts (both successful and failed).

member.name: F:SmppSharp.SmppMetrics.SubmitDuration
member.summary: Time from sending submit_sm to receiving submit_sm_resp (ms).

member.name: F:SmppSharp.SmppMetrics.ActiveConnections
member.summary: Currently active (bound) SMPP connections.

member.name: T:SmppSharp.SmppOptions
member.summary: Configuration for an SMPP client connection.

member.name: P:SmppSharp.SmppOptions.EnquireLinkInterval
member.summary: Interval between enquire_link keepalive PDUs. Default: 30s.

member.name: P:SmppSharp.SmppOptions.ResponseTimeout
member.summary: How long to wait for a PDU response before throwing. Default: 30s.

member.name: P:SmppSharp.SmppOptions.ReconnectDelay
member.summary: Delay before each reconnect attempt. Default: 5s.

member.name: P:SmppSharp.SmppOptions.AutoReconnect
member.summary: Whether to automatically reconnect on disconnect. Default: true.

member.name: P:SmppSharp.SmppOptions.MaxReconnectAttempts
member.summary: Maximum reconnect attempts. 0 = infinite.

member.name: P:SmppSharp.SmppOptions.UseSsl
member.summary: Enable SSL/TLS. Default: false.

member.name: P:SmppSharp.SmppOptions.SslTargetHost
member.summary: TLS target hostname. Defaults to Host if not set.

member.name: P:SmppSharp.SmppOptions.AllowUntrustedCertificate
member.summary: Skip certificate validation (useful for self-signed certs in dev). Default: false.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.IdPattern_0
member.summary: Custom -derived type for the IdPattern method.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.IdPattern_0.Instance
member.summary: Cached, thread-safe singleton instance.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.IdPattern_0.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes the instance.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.IdPattern_0.RunnerFactory
member.summary: Provides a factory for creating instances to be used by methods on .

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.IdPattern_0.RunnerFactory.CreateInstance
member.summary: Creates an instance of a used by methods on .

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.IdPattern_0.RunnerFactory.Runner
member.summary: Provides the runner that contains the custom logic implementing the specified regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.IdPattern_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.Scan(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.IdPattern_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.IdPattern_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryMatchAtCurrentPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.SubPattern_1
member.summary: Custom -derived type for the SubPattern method.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.SubPattern_1.Instance
member.summary: Cached, thread-safe singleton instance.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.SubPattern_1.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes the instance.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.SubPattern_1.RunnerFactory
member.summary: Provides a factory for creating instances to be used by methods on .

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.SubPattern_1.RunnerFactory.CreateInstance
member.summary: Creates an instance of a used by methods on .

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.SubPattern_1.RunnerFactory.Runner
member.summary: Provides the runner that contains the custom logic implementing the specified regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.SubPattern_1.RunnerFactory.Runner.Scan(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.SubPattern_1.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.SubPattern_1.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryMatchAtCurrentPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.DlvrdPattern_2
member.summary: Custom -derived type for the DlvrdPattern method.

member.summary: Cached, thread-safe singleton instance.

member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.
